front: How is peptide purity determined by RP-HPLC?
back: Peptide purity is assessed by area-under-curve (AUC) percentage of the main peak in RP-HPLC. Requirements: ≥95% for research, ≥98% for clinical, ≥99% for injectable. System suitability: column efficiency >10,000 plates, tailing factor <2.0, resolution >2.0 between critical pairs.
